rationale: Superseded by S-0009-03 (v2 row-count expansion) and S-0009-05 (v2 human review pass). The v1-era 'row-count expansion' framing of S-0005-01 is stale now that the v2 schema is the canonical annotation foundation; the scaling and human-review tracks are owned end-to-end by the S-0009-03 / S-0009-05 follow-ups.
